overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through the Elgin House luxury apartment complex during sunset. The player character walks along the sidewalk, enters the courtyard, explores the pool deck and outdoor dining terrace, then exits to a street-side pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to retaining wall

events.description: slowing to observe two npcs standing against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a beige wall, approaching two npcs

notable_agents.action: two characters standing against the wall, one looking at phone

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running along the sidewalk
multi-story building with balconies behind the wall
tall palm trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow urban sidewalk next to a tall beige retaining wall during golden hour. Two NPCs stand against the wall ahead, and palm trees line the distant street. The camera moves steadily forward toward the apartment entrance.

events.description: turning left and ascending stairs into the Elgin House courtyard
reaching top of stairs and entering the paved plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: two men standing at the top of the stairs, one holding a coffee cup

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading up to the plaza
patterned tile work on the plaza floor

segments.scene_description: Ascending the stone stairs into the Elgin House courtyard plaza. Two NPCs stand at the top near the entrance, and the decorative tile pavement becomes visible. The building facade with its signage is prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop pool deck with lounge area

events.description: moving from entrance plaza to the pool deck area
sun glare becomes prominent while facing the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking around the pool deck, viewing the swimming pool and lounge chairs from different angles

entered.detail: rectangular pool with blue water and metal ladder
white lounge chairs arranged near the pool
large umbrellas providing shade over seating areas

segments.scene_description: Exploring the open pool deck area with a rectangular swimming pool at its center. Lounge chairs and umbrellas line the deck, and the setting sun creates a warm glare. The area is empty of people, emphasizing the tranquil atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace with tables and umbrellas

events.description: leaving pool area and entering the outdoor dining terrace
passing close by seated npcs at dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking through the dining terrace between rows of tables and chairs

notable_agents.action: man wearing a hat sitting at a table holding a cup
two women standing and conversing near the terrace edge

entered.detail: wooden tables arranged in rows on the terrace
matching wooden chairs around the tables
distinctive domed building visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking through the outdoor dining terrace filled with wooden tables and chairs under large umbrellas. Several NPCs are seated or standing around, including a man in a hat drinking coffee. The observatory dome is visible in the distant background.

events.description: exiting the dining terrace onto a narrow pathway beside the street
vehicles visible moving on the street below to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway next to a retaining wall, with street traffic visible below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: concrete wall running along the left side of the path
large advertising billboard above the street
mature trees lining the street below

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow elevated pathway that runs alongside the street. The dining terrace falls behind as the camera moves past a retaining wall toward a multi-story parking garage. Street traffic and trees are visible below to the right, and the lighting becomes slightly dimmer as the sun sets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow urban sidewalk into the luxurious heart of the Elgin House complex before exiting back toward the city streets. It begins by moving steadily along a beige retaining wall under the warm glow of golden hour, passing palm trees as it approaches the apartment entrance. The camera then ascends stone stairs into a decorative courtyard plaza, transitioning from the public walkway into an open pool deck where lounge chairs and umbrellas surround a tranquil swimming pool. As the movement continues, the scene shifts into a bustling outdoor dining terrace filled with wooden tables and patrons, with a distant observatory dome framing the horizon. Finally, the camera leaves the terrace to follow a narrow elevated pathway, moving past a retaining wall toward a multi-story parking garage as the sunlight dims and street traffic becomes visible below.
